name: Minimal
description: Clean, typographic slide with a large heading and body text
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Label / tag
slots.description: Small label shown above the heading

slots.label: Image
slots.description: Optional image. File path (relative to data JSON) or https:// URL. Displayed as a full-width block.

slots.label: Image position
slots.description: Where to place the image: 'top' (above heading, max 760px), 'middle' (rounded inset between heading and body, max 640px), or 'bottom' (fills remaining space below text). Images use object-fit:contain — never cropped. Default: bottom.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for the label and decorative line
